text: Within the serene cleanliness of the first corridor, time drags and my footsteps echo with anticipation—a sterile emptiness that invites self-reflection but also a faint sense of alienation. Yet, in the second space, the vibrant display of "R+D" invigorates me. Here, intellect and creativity collide, walls pulsing with innovation and ideas. I feel curious, almost hopeful, reminded that even within constructed sanctuaries, there thrives the human urge to understand, connect, and evolve with our inventions. In both spaces, I am acutely aware of my consciousness—restless in stillness, enlivened by possibility.
